channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Glade Brook in talks to join Sarvam’s funding; AI startup may hit $1.5 billion valuation
item.description: US-based Glade Brook Capital is in discussions to invest $20-25 million in Sarvam AI's $320-350 million funding round, valuing the AI startup at $1.5 billion. Strategic investors like Nvidia, Amazon, and HCLTech, alongside venture capital firms, are also part… [Amazon, Nvidia]

item.title: Morgan Stanley sees agentic AI widening chip spending beyond graphics processors to CPUs
item.description: Morgan Stanley estimates agentic AI could add $32.5–60 billion ​to a data-centre CPU ‌market already exceeding $100 billion by 2030

item.title: Australia’s NEXTDC launches A$2.2 billion capital plan
item.description: The ASX-listed data centre operator is raising A$1.5 billion in a fully underwritten equity offering and expanding its hybrid securities programme by A$700 million, with La Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec now committed to a total of A$1.7 billion. The … [ServiceNow]

item.title: Korean Stocks Erase War Loss as Chipmakers Rise on AI Resurgence
item.description: South Korean stocks have erased the slide triggered by the Iran war, driven by a rally in chipmakers as escalating US–Iran tensions bring the artificial intelligence trade back into investor focus. [Intel]

item.title: Acer Marks 50 Years of Global Innovation With a Heavy Pivot Toward AI and E-Mobility
item.description: As it celebrates a half-century in the industry and 34 years in the Middle East, the PC maker is aligning its future hardware roadmap with the region's aggressive push into artificial intelligence. [Intel]
